entity.summary: Turkish centralized crypto-asset trading platform whose foundations were laid in 2017 and whose Bitlo.com trading service launched in 2018.
entity.notes: Bitlo's official company history states that the platform's foundations were laid in 2017 and crypto trading services launched on Bitlo.com in 2018. The exact launch day is not stated, so HEI uses a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: Bitlo.com crypto trading service launched
events.description: Bitlo launched cryptocurrency trading services on Bitlo.com in 2018 after the platform's foundations were laid in 2017.
events.notes: The official sources state the launch year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bitlo official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitlo identity and active trading service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitlo
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bitlo exchange identity.

evidence.title: Who we are — Bitlo
evidence.notes: Official company history states that crypto trading services launched on Bitlo.com in 2018.

evidence.title: Bitlo in the press
evidence.notes: Official press archive says the platform has served users since 2018 and references its earlier launch announcement.
